title: Vi Vision Zones Archetype (render-type)
description:
The ZONES archetype — an instance of archetype.schema.json (render_kind='zones'): renders a structured thing's SECTIONS as navigable spatial REGIONS (the almanac renderer pointed at JSON — NOT markdown, NOT a text-wall). A FACE-1 surface archetype.

WHAT IT RENDERS: the sections of an addressed structure as spatial zones + a navigable index. Grounded in REAL usage — board-view (the loop board / COMMISSION-COMPLETION-REGISTER: criteria · capability · mentioned · form-intent as zones + the register items as an index), any structured doc/registry made spatial. Bound to the now-LIVE /api/board (32 items serving). DNA renders (the almanac/zones renderer); the resolver places (wide = a zone grid; narrow = a stacked accordion of zones).

Mostly READ (zones show structure); an optional take navigates/opens a zone or an index item.

LAWS (inherited from archetype.schema): operator-legibility (each zone titled by MEANING, items human-named, never raw json keys) · DNA-token-built · resolver-placed (grid↔accordion) · navigable-not-text (the anti-markdown-wall archetype) · native dual-device.

zones.description: The SECTIONS source — the structure's sections rendered as spatial regions (each with a human title + its content). e.g. the board's sections.

index.description: Optional: a navigable INDEX source — the items as a navigable list/grid (e.g. the register items).
